name: AnalysisObjectEnumerator
summary: The AnalysisObjectEnumerator class provides the means to iterate through analysis object instances.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Returns a pointer to the existing instance of the class. This allows the usage of the foreach statement with AnalysisObjectEnumerator.

methods.name: GetSize
methods.summary: Returns the total amout of items.

methods.name: MoveNext
methods.summary: Moves to the next item in the enumerator.

methods.name: Refresh
methods.summary: Refreshes the enumerator with latest data at database.

methods.name: Reset
methods.summary: Resets the enumerator to the beginning.

properties.name: Current
properties.summary: Gets the current analysis object in the enumerator.

properties.name: CurrentItem
properties.summary: Gets or sets the index of the current item.

properties.name: CurrentSelected
properties.summary: Gets or sets the currently selected item.

properties.name: SelectInstances
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the instance's Select() is called when the "Current" item is asked from the enumerator. The user can set this to "false" if no members are ever asked from the instance. This is the case when e.g. asking only a report property from this identifier. WARNING: normally the user should not change this value.
